## Content
"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>See a water pipe, I mean copper.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>We have no hangers for any of the copper pipe.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>We don't have a piece of copper pipe hung in the air.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>How do you how do you work on a job the first day and have know all the materials?</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>How do you do that?</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>How you normal?</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Yeah.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>First of all, first of all, what you should have done was look at your blurints, before you even walked on the job.</div>
